bhńĀj a. (Usually at the end of comp.)
1 Sharing or participating in, liable to; pńĀpaňö  Ku. 5. 83 ; doŠĻ£aňö guilty.
2 Having, enjoying, possessing, obtaining; sukhaňö, rikthaňö.
3 Entitled to.
4 Feeling, experiencing, being sensible of.
5 Devoting oneself to.
6 Living in, inhabiting, dwelling in; as in kuharabhńĀj, darńębhńĀj &c.
7 Going or resorting to, seeking.
8 Worshipping.
9 Falling to the lot of.
10 What must be done, a duty (kartavya);  Bk. 3. 21.
